message:
feat(inode): bump i_version on every inode modification for NFSv4/statx

Added bump_inode_version() that increments the 64-bit NFS inode version
counter (i_version at 0x24 + i_version_hi at 0x98). Called from both
touch_mtime_ctime() and touch_ctime() so every inode-modifying operation
(write, create, mkdir, unlink, rename, setattr, etc.) advances the
counter.

Without this, NFS clients mounting FrankenFS-served ext4 images would
never see version changes, causing indefinite stale cache serving.
The kernel's ext4_inode_set_iversion_raw() does the same bump.

The counter uses wrapping_add for correct behavior at u64::MAX.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
